name: Loops

auth.notes: API key in Authorization Bearer header; CLI uses LOOPS_API_KEY or keyring.

rateLimits: 10 requests/second per team; x-ratelimit headers; 429 on exceed.
pagination: Cursor/perPage on paginated list endpoints such as campaigns, themes, components, and dedicated sending IPs; inspect official OpenAPI for exact endpoint support.
notes: Profile targets Loops.so, the email platform for software companies; useLoops.io is a different product and is intentionally excluded.
Official OpenAPI 3.1.0 spec currently reports version 1.8.1 and 20 API paths; use source links to refresh endpoint-level details before implementation.
